calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Fredys Carranza

Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: D. Carter;
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:59am and concluding at 11:02am.

Jonathan Vaknin, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank.
No appearance by Defendant Fredys Carranza.

The court hears teistimony from Mr. Vaknin and reviews the evidence filed in this matter.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, and against Defendant Fredys Carranza.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is awarded judgment against Defendant Fredys Carranza as follows:

Damages/Principal: $10,258.87
Costs: $275.00
Total Judgment: $10,533.87

No proposed order was submitted to the court. Mr. Vaknin was instructed to leave a copy in dept. 505's drop box or email it to department 505 for signartue to Judge Hayashi.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions As Admitted
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions As Admitted.

Wells Fargo Bank's Unopposed Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions is GRANTED.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/SKF)
